data.title: CrowdStrike and IBM Expand Strategic Collaboration to Accelerate Agentic SOC Transformation
data.description: A strategic collaboration between CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) and IBM has been expanded to bolster SOC transformation efforts. The partnership, announced in RSA 2026, will incorporate CrowdStrike's Charlotte AI™ with IBM's Autonomous Threat Operations Machine (ATOM), an autonomous SOC orchestration engine. This integration aims to facilitate rapid investigation and containment at machine speed. Additionally, the collaboration will see the extension of CrowdStrike's Falcon® platform into IBM Consul.

data.title: Nordea Bank Abp: Repurchase of own shares on 25.03.2026
data.description: On March 25, 2026, Nordea Bank Abp in Helsinki, Finland, announced changes in its own shares at 22:30 EET. The bank (LEI: 529900ODI3047E2LIV03) disclosed the completion of repurchases of its own shares (ISIN: FI4000297767) on the same day. The specific details of the repurchases, including quantities and prices, were not provided in the news.

data.title: Consequences of abnormal seismic activity at the Garpenberg mine
data.description: In Garpenberg, the recent surge in seismic activity has subsided, leading to plans to resume mining operations at reduced capacities in the second quarter of 2026. Initial production figures for the first quarter indicate a throughput of approximately 0.8 million tons, falling short of the projected slightly over 0.9 million tons.

data.title: Settlement Reached in Foroughi obo Laurel School v. Laurel School PTO, et al.
data.description: Today, Jaclyn Foroughi of Laurel School Parent Teacher Organization (PTO) announced significant reforms and the settlement of the case Foroughi obo Laurel School v. Laurel School PTO, et al. in San Mateo County Superior Court (Case No. 21CIV01197). The settlement marks a milestone for the organization, with key changes being implemented moving forward. This development comes after a period of legal proceedings in San Mateo, California.

data.title: Oceaneering Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: Oceaneering has set the dates for its first quarter 2026 earnings release and conference call as April 22 and April 23, respectively.

data.title: PBF Energy to Release First Quarter 2026 Earnings Results
data.description: PBF Energy Inc., traded on NYSE under the ticker symbol PBF, disclosed in Parsippany, N.J. on March 25, 2026, that they are planning to unveil their Q1 2026 earnings report on April 30, 2026. A conference call and webcast discussing the financial outcomes and various operational issues will be conducted by the company on that day.

data.title: Pembina Pipeline Declares Quarterly Preferred Share Dividends and Announces Business Update and First Quarter 2026 Results Conference Calls
data.description: Pembina Pipeline Corporation disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved quarterly dividends for its preferred shares, including Series 1, 3, 5, 7, 15, 17, 21, and 25. The dividends for Series 1, 3, 5, 7, and 21 will be paid on June 1, 2026, to shareholders on record as of May 1, 2026. On the other hand, dividends for Series 15 and 17 will be paid on June 30, 2026, to shareholders on record as of June 15. The company's preferred shares trade on both the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: PPL) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: PBA).
SIR Royalty Income Fund Announces Filing of SIR Corp. Fiscal 2026 Second Quarter Results

data.title: Inventronics Announces 2025 Year End Financial Results
data.description: Inventronics Limited, a Canadian manufacturer of enclosures for various industries in North America, released its financial results for 2025. The company reported a net income of $282,000, or 5.8 cents per share, on revenue of $8,247,000 for the year ending December 31, 2025. This is a significant improvement from the previous year when they had a net loss of $62,000, or 1.3 cents per share, on revenue of $6,309,000. For the fourth quarter of 2025, Inventronics reported a net loss of $151,000, or 3.1 cents per share, on revenue of $1,552,000. This was an improvement from the same period in 2024, where they had a net loss of $242,000, or 5.0 cents per share, on revenue of $1,304,000. The detailed financial results are available for review.

data.title: Navan Stock Soars On Q4 Earnings Beat (CORRECTED)
data.description: Update: The revenue estimate for fiscal 2027 has been revised. Navan Inc (NASDAQ: NAVN) shares are seeing an increase in after-hours trading following the release of the fourth-quarter financial results. Navan stock is experiencing a significant surge today. In the latest report, Navan surpassed expectations, with fourth-quarter revenue reaching $177.92 million, exceeding analyst predictions of $162 million. The company also posted adjusted earnings of two cents per share for the quarter, surpassing estimates. For further details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Southern Nevada Leaders Launch Regional Partnership to Drive Job Creation and Strengthen Workforce
data.description: A collaborative effort has been established in Las Vegas on March 25, 2026, involving Workforce Connections, the Vegas Chamber of Commerce, the Las Vegas Global Economic Alliance, the Henderson Chamber of Commerce, the Latin Chamber of Commerce, and the Urban Chamber of Commerce. These organizations have joined forces to coordinate their efforts in workforce development.

data.title: In HelloNation, Real Estate Attorney James Weaver Kirkpatrick, III Discusses the Legalities of Buying a Home
data.description: In Waynesville, North Carolina, on March 25, 2026, a recent article by HelloNation delves into the crucial legal and financial aspects that potential homebuyers should thoroughly examine before completing a home purchase. Specifically focusing on North Carolina's real estate market, the article emphasizes the importance of conducting a comprehensive review of certain details before committing to a property. By providing insights into what to verify and the reasons behind the necessity of preparation, the article aims to equip buyers with the knowledge to make informed decisions in the home-buying process.

data.title: GitHub will utilize Copilot user code for AI training by default from April 24. Opt-out option available. Enterprise users not affected.
data.description: Beginning on April 24th, GitHub will utilize user interaction data from Copilot Free, Pro, and Pro+ accounts for AI training unless developers choose to opt out. It is important to note that enterprise users will be exempt from this data collection process.
Dyadic Announces 2025 Financial Results and Highlights Recent Company Progress

data.title: Hecla Mining Company Closes Casa Berardi Sale and Announces Redemption Notice for Senior Notes
data.description: In Coeur d'Alene, Idaho, Hecla Mining Company (NYSE:HL) has successfully finalized the sale of its subsidiary holding the Casa Berardi Mine in Quebec, Canada to a wholly-owned subsidiary of Orezone Gold Corporation (TSX: ORE | ASX: ORE | OTCQX: ORZCF). This transaction, as outlined on January 26, 2026, enhances Hecla's strategic position as a leading North American company. This move marks a significant development for Hecla and Orezone, reinforcing their market presence.

data.title: The 5th Annual Fashion, Food & Wine Showcase: Where the Next Generation of Fashion & Culinary Leaders Take Center Stage
data.description: In Miami Gardens, Florida, the 5th Annual Fashion, Food, and Wine Showcase will be held at St. Thomas University (STU) on March 25, 2026. This event highlights the merging of fashion, culinary arts, and hospitality by showcasing student innovations and practical learning experiences.
